specs.spec: FileScanner walks the project directory for files ending in .pin.xml, parses each as XML, extracts spec elements with their id attribute, SHA1-hashes the trimmed inner content, and returns Spec records with ID, Hash, Filepath, and LineNumber.

FileScanner walks the project directory for code files by extension, finds lines matching the #F shortcode pattern, SHA1-hashes the next 10 lines from the marker line, and returns Marker records with ID, Hash, Filepath, and LineNumber.
All hashing uses SHA1 hex-encoded via crypto/sha1 and fmt percent-x formatting. The hash is deterministic across runs for identical content.
Duplicate spec IDs across files cause an error with the duplicate ID quoted.
Duplicate marker shortcodes across files cause an error with the duplicate shortcode quoted.
A spec element without an id attribute causes an error.

Only files with recognized code extensions are scanned for markers: .go, .py, .js, .ts, .jsx, .tsx, .java, .c, .cpp, .h, .hpp, .rs, .rb, .php, .swift, .kt, .cs, .scala, .sh, .bash, .lua, .dart, .vue, .svelte.
